frontmatter.subtitle: hello :D
frontmatter.content: My name is Dhen Emmanuel Padilla. I am a recent Computer Science masters graduate, from University College London. My interests lie in Deep Neural Networks, specifically Natural Language Processing and Decentralised Ledger Technologies. I am currently a Software Engineer for ARM and applying for PhDs in Computer Science. Highly driven to create social change and determined to impact the world in a positive way. Enjoy your stay! 💁🏻‍♂️
